risk_note.tr: Adimlar Microsoft Support 'Get help with Windows activation errors' belgesinden alinmistir. Sadece okuma ve resmi Troubleshooter kullanimi - sisteme zarar vermez.
risk_note.en: Steps sourced from Microsoft Support 'Get help with Windows activation errors'. Read-only and official Troubleshooter usage - no system impact.

body.tr: Microsoft Support 4 adim listeliyor: (1) En son Windows guncellemesini yukle, (2) Activation Troubleshooter'i calistir, (3) Hata kodunu kontrol et ve karsiligindaki ozel cozumu uygula, (4) Hata kodunun degisip degismedigini dogrula.
body.en: Microsoft Support lists 4 steps: (1) Verify the device runs the latest Windows update, (2) Run the Activation Troubleshooter, (3) Check the error code and apply its specific resolution, (4) Verify whether the error code changed.

title.tr: Activation Troubleshooter: Settings > System > Activation > Troubleshoot
title.en: Activation Troubleshooter: Settings > System > Activation > Troubleshoot

title.tr: Detayli lisans bilgisi (urun anahtari, kanal, status)
title.en: Detailed license info (product key, channel, status)
Common error codes documented by Microsoft

body.tr: 0xC004F211 / 0xC004F213: Donanim degisikligi sonrasi yeniden aktivasyon gerekli. 0x803F7001: Gecerli Windows lisansi bulunamadi - urun anahtari girin. 0x800704CF: Gecerli lisans yok - yeni urun anahtari gerekli. 0xC004C003: Urun anahtari baska cihazda kullanildi. 0xC004FC03: Internet baglantisi yok veya guvenlik duvari engeli.
body.en: 0xC004F211 / 0xC004F213: Reactivation required after hardware change. 0x803F7001: No valid Windows license - enter product key. 0x800704CF: No valid license - new product key required. 0xC004C003: Product key used on another device. 0xC004FC03: No internet or firewall block.

title.tr: Urun anahtarini nereden bulurum (Microsoft Support listesi)
title.en: Where to find the product key (Microsoft Support list)

body.tr: (a) Satin alma onay e-postasi, (b) cihaz ambalajinin ici, (c) cihazin arka/alt yuzundeki Certificate of Authenticity (COA) etiketi.
body.en: (a) Purchase confirmation email, (b) inside the device packaging, (c) Certificate of Authenticity (COA) sticker on back/bottom of device.
